pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the municipal nursery and daycare service, providing entry points to search for nurseries, book visits, explore activities, understand fees, and view closure information.
primary_functions: Provide clear navigation links to Find a nursery, Book a visit, Activities, Fees, and Calendar & Closures
Offer a quick nursery search widget (age, distance, care type) that leads to the nursery search results page
Highlight popular tasks such as applying for a place, booking visits, checking closures, and using the fee calculator

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on main navigation item "Find a nursery" in the header
Submit the quick nursery search widget
Click on main navigation item "Visits & Tours" or homepage shortcut card
Click on main navigation item "Activities & Programs" or homepage shortcut card
Click on main navigation item "Fees & Subsidies" or homepage shortcut card
Click on homepage shortcut for "Calendar & Closures"
Click on homepage shortcut for "Use the fee calculator"

access_methods.description: Main landing page linked as "Home" in the global header navigation
Landing page from external municipal portals or search engines

pages.name: Nursery Search & Results
pages.description: Main search and listing page for all nurseries and daycare centers, supporting complex filters for applications, favorites, and detail views.
primary_functions: Search and filter nurseries by child age, desired start date, distance, district, care type, monthly fee, rating, opening hours, and meals/diet options
Sort nursery results by monthly fee, rating, opening time, distance, or name
Open nursery detail pages to view full information for a selected nursery
Add or remove nurseries from a multi-nursery application selection and start the application wizard with selected nurseries
Add or remove nurseries from the users favorites list directly from result cards

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected child age in years to initialize the age filter.
Initial desired start date for care in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.
Maximum distance from home in kilometers for initial search.
District filter to pre-select (e.g., 'north', 'east').
Care type to preselect, e.g., 'full_day_8h_plus' or 'half_day_5h'.
Maximum monthly fee to initialize the fee filter.
Minimum nursery rating (e.g., 4.5) to pre-filter results.
Earliest opening time (e.g., '07:00') for the opening-hours filter.
If 'true', limit results to nurseries with nut-free menus.
If 'true', limit results to nurseries with lactose-free options.
Initial sort key, e.g., 'monthly_fee_asc', 'rating_desc', 'opening_time_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a nursery card/title in the results list
Click "Start application with selected nurseries" after selecting one or more nurseries
Click "View all favorites" from the favorites counter or banner

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Find a nursery" header navigation link
Accessed with pre-filled filters from the homepage quick search or other deep links
Can be linked directly from external pages describing nursery search

pages.name: Nursery Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a single nursery or daycare center, including opening hours, fees, facilities, meals, and actions such as applying, favoriting, and booking visits.
primary_functions: Display full nursery information including address, district, distance from home, opening hours, care types, fees, facilities, rating, and available programs
Provide tabbed sections such as Overview, Opening hours, Meals & Nutrition, Facilities, and Visits
Start a single-nursery application by sending the user to the application wizard with this nursery pre-selected
Allow the user to add or remove this nursery from their favorites list
Provide a link or button to book a visit for this nursery, opening the visit booking page
Link to the contact page with the nursery name referenced for inquiries (e.g., about meals or other topics)

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the nursery whose details are to be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Apply for a place" button on the nursery detail page
Click the "Book a visit" button in the Visits tab or overview section
Click a "Ask about meals/allergies" or "Contact us about this nursery" link

access_methods.description: Accessed by following a link with a nurseryId query parameter from search results, favorites, or visit search

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Page listing nurseries that the user has saved to favorites, with options to manage and start applications or visit bookings.
primary_functions: Display a list of all nurseries the user has saved as favorites with key information (rating, distance, fees, opening time)
Open nursery detail pages for any saved nursery
Remove nurseries from the favorites list
Start an application or a visit booking for a selected favorite nursery

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a favorite nursery card/title
Click an "Apply for a place" action on a favorite nursery
Click a "Book a visit" action on a favorite nursery

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Favorites" link in the global header
May be linked from confirmation messages after adding a favorite

pages.name: Visit Search
pages.description: Page to find nurseries available for visits and tours, filter them, and start the booking process.
primary_functions: Search and filter nurseries for visits by child age, distance from home, facilities (e.g., large outdoor playground), maximum monthly fee, and rating
Sort visit search results by rating, distance, or earliest available opening time if applicable
Show a list of nurseries with quick access to book a visit for each one
Open the visit booking page for a selected nursery via a Book a visit action

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected child age to initialize the visit search filter.
Maximum distance from home for initial visit search.
If 'true', pre-check the filter for nurseries with a large outdoor playground.
Maximum monthly fee to constrain visit search to affordable nurseries.
Minimum rating to apply when the page first loads.
Sorting key such as 'rating_desc', 'distance_asc', or 'opening_time_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Book a visit" button on a nursery card
Click the nursery name or "View details" on a card

access_methods.description: Directly accessible through the "Visits & Tours" header link
Accessed with query parameters to pre-filter visit search from other pages

pages.name: Visit Booking
pages.description: Booking form for scheduling a visit or tour at a specific nursery, including date/time selection and visitor details.
primary_functions: Show the selected nursery name and basic info for context while booking a visit
Allow the user to choose a visit date using a calendar, including selecting specific days such as the next Wednesday
Allow the user to select a time slot (e.g., between 09:00 and 11:00) from available options for the chosen date
Collect visitor details such as parent name, phone number, and preferred reminder method (e.g., SMS)
Confirm and submit the visit booking and display a summary with an option to finish the booking flow

incoming_params.description: ID of the nursery for which the visit is being booked.
Optional pre-selected visit date in 'YYYY-MM-DD', if suggested from search.
If present, load an existing booking summary using this ID.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Finish" or "Done" button on the booking summary after a successful booking

access_methods.description: Accessed by following a link with nurseryId (and optionally visitDate or visitBookingId) from visit search, nursery details, or favorites

pages.name: Activities & Holiday Programs
pages.description: Search and listing page for municipal daycare activities, afternoon programs, and holiday sessions, with filters for age, month, time-of-day, and price.
primary_functions: Filter activities by age group (e.g., 45 years), month or date range (e.g., July 2025), time of day (morning, afternoon, full day), and maximum session price
Display activity cards grouped by center or showing center name so users can identify multiple activities at the same center
Open activity detail pages to view more information about a specific activity
Add activities directly to a registration list with quick actions (e.g., Register or Add to registration) from the cards
Provide navigation or breadcrumbs back to this list while retaining the users selected filters and sorting

incoming_params.description: Minimum age in years used to initialize the age filter.
Maximum age in years used to initialize the age filter.
Month filter in 'YYYY-MM', e.g., '2025-07' for July 2025.
Time of day filter, e.g., 'morning', 'afternoon', or 'full_day'.
Maximum price per session used for price filtering.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an activity card to view its details
Click "View registration list" after adding one or more activities

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Activities & Programs" header navigation link
Filters can be shared or reloaded using query parameters

pages.name: Activity Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single activity or holiday program session, including description, schedule, pricing, and center information, with an option to add the session to the registration list.
primary_functions: Show full details of the activity including description, age range, dates, times, price, location, and center name
Allow the user to register for the activity by adding it to a registration list, capturing child name and number of children
Confirm that the activity was added to the registration list and optionally link to the registration summary page
Provide a clear link or breadcrumb back to the filtered activities list while keeping the original filters (age, month, time, price) applied

incoming_params.description: ID of the activity whose details should be displayed.
URL-encoded query string representing the filters used on the activities list, to support returning with preserved filters.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to activities list" breadcrumb, reusing the returnQuery or browser history to restore filters
Click "View registration list" after adding the activity to the registration list

access_methods.description: Accessed via an activityId query parameter from the activities listing

pages.name: Activity Registration Summary
pages.description: Overview of all activities the user has selected for registration, grouped by center, with options to adjust child details, remove items, and submit the registration.
primary_functions: Display a list of all activities currently in the users registration list, grouped by center and showing dates, times, and prices
Allow the user to remove individual activities from the registration list before final submission
Show child details used for registration and allow editing if necessary
Submit the final registration for all listed activities in one step and show a confirmation message

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Add more activities" link to return to browsing
Click "Back to home" after successful submission and confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed via "View registration list" links from activities or activity detail pages

pages.name: Fees & Subsidies Overview
pages.description: Information page explaining fee structures and available subsidies, with illustrative examples and a link to the interactive fee calculator.
primary_functions: Present general information about nursery and daycare fees, including examples for half-day and full-day schedules
Explain available subsidies, discounts, and eligibility criteria in simple terms
Provide a prominent link or button to open the interactive fee calculator tool
Offer links to start an application once the user understands the likely fee levels

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Fee calculator" button or link on this page
Click a "Start an application" call-to-action after reading about fees

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Fees & Subsidies" header navigation entry
Linked from the footer as "Fees & Subsidies"

pages.name: Fee Calculator
pages.description: Interactive tool to estimate monthly nursery fees for different schedules and compare and save preferred fee plans based on household income and child age.
primary_functions: Collect inputs such as household monthly income, child age, and selected schedule (e.g., half-day 5 days/week, full-day 5 days/week)
Calculate and display the estimated monthly fee for the selected schedule when the user clicks Calculate fee
Allow changing the schedule (e.g., from half-day to full-day) while keeping other inputs, and recalculate to compare fees
Visually compare the fees for different schedules and indicate which option is cheaper
Let the user save the cheaper or preferred schedule as a named plan (e.g., My chosen schedule) for future reference on this page

incoming_params.description: Optional income value to pre-fill the calculator when coming from the fees overview.
Optional child age to pre-fill the calculator.
Optional schedule type, e.g., 'half_day_5_days' or 'full_day_5_days', used to preselect a schedule.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Fees & Subsidies" link from the calculator page
Click an optional "Start application" call-to-action after saving a preferred fee plan

access_methods.description: Opened from the Fees & Subsidies overview via a "Fee calculator" link or button
May receive optional query parameters to pre-fill calculator inputs

pages.name: Application Wizard
pages.description: Multi-step application page for applying for nursery places, supporting both single-nursery and multi-nursery applications with ranked preferences and child/parent details.
primary_functions: Start with pre-selected nurseries either from a nursery detail page, from the nursery search selection, or from the closure calendar date, and display them as choices
Allow the user to add or remove nurseries within the application via an embedded nursery selection section that can filter by district (e.g., East, North) and other criteria
Enable ranking of multiple nurseries into ordered preferences (Preference 1, 2, 3) using drag-and-drop or preference dropdowns
Collect application details including desired start date (with date picker), care type (e.g., full day 8+ hours), and schedule options
Collect child details such as name and date of birth, and parent contact information where needed
Save and continue through the steps, storing the ranked list of nurseries and other application details, and display a confirmation of saved preferences

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the draft or existing application to be edited within the wizard.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to home" or similar button after successfully submitting the application

access_methods.description: Accessed with an applicationId parameter after starting an application from search, nursery detail, favorites, or calendar pages

pages.name: Calendar & Closures
pages.description: Calendar view showing open and closed days for nurseries and daycare centers, helping users choose appropriate start dates and start applications directly from an open day.
primary_functions: Display a monthly calendar with closed days clearly marked and allow switching months (e.g., selecting August 2025)
Allow users to click on an open day to highlight it and see basic notes about availability or holiday periods
Provide an action such as Apply from this date or Start application that sends the selected date to the application wizard
Help users determine the first open day after a given date (e.g., after 2025-08-15) so they can choose an appropriate start date for their application

incoming_params.description: Year to display in the calendar view, e.g., 2025.
Month (1-12) to display in the calendar view.
Optional date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' to compute and highlight the first open day after this date.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Apply from this date" on a selected open calendar day

access_methods.description: Available from the global header as "Calendar & Closures"
Calendar view can be deep-linked to a specific month and year using query parameters

pages.name: Contact / General Inquiry
pages.description: General contact form page for inquiries about nurseries, meals, fees, visits, and applications, optionally tied to a specific nursery.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form to collect the users name, email, phone number, and message
Offer a subject or category dropdown including options such as Meals / Allergies, Applications, Visits & Tours, and General question
Allow the message to reference a specific nursery, optionally pre-filling the nursery name when the user navigates here from a nursery detail page
Submit the inquiry and display a confirmation that the message has been sent

incoming_params.description: Optional subject/category preselection, e.g., 'meals_allergies' or 'visits_tours'.
Optional nursery ID used to associate the inquiry with a specific nursery.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to home" after the confirmation message is shown

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Contact us" link in the header
Accessible via the "Contact" link in the footer
May be opened from nursery details with subject and nurseryId pre-filled via query parameters

pages.name: About the Municipal Nursery Service
pages.description: Informational page describing the mission, values, structure, and coverage of the municipal nursery and daycare system, with links to key actions.
primary_functions: Explain the mission, values, and structure of the municipal nursery and daycare services
Provide high-level information on districts served, number of centers, and contact channels
Link to key functional pages such as Find a nursery, Fees & Subsidies, and Contact for users needing more detailed actions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Find a nursery" link within the About content
Click a "Learn about fees & subsidies" link within the About content
Click a "Contact the nursery service" link within the About content

access_methods.description: Linked from the footer as "About"
Can be used as an informational landing page from external sources

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all main services
Search and filter nurseries and daycare centers
Find nurseries and book a visit or tour
Browse and register for activities and holiday programs
Learn about fees and subsidies and access the fee calculator
View open and closed days for nurseries
View nurseries saved to your favorites list
Send a general inquiry or specific question (e.g., about meals or allergies)

footer_links.description: About the municipal nursery and daycare service
Search all nurseries and daycare centers
Overview of fees and subsidy information
Annual closure calendar and open days
